notes:
Left sidebar rebuild — a cleaner, calmer navigation rail (Left-Sidebar spec v0.4).

**New**

- The sidebar is reorganised top-to-bottom: account · search · **New note** (now
  right above Home) · Home · Journal · All notes · **Pinned** · **Recent** ·
  **Organise** (All folders · All tags · Archive · Trash) · **Settings** pinned
  to the bottom.

**Fixes & polish**

- New note is its own row above Home with a ⌘N hint; the count next to All notes
  now abbreviates large numbers (e.g. 2.4k).
- Pinned and Recent tuck away when empty; Organise always shows its four items.
- Import and Export markdown are no longer in the sidebar — they live in the File
  menu (and Export in ⌘K), keeping the rail focused on navigation.
- Tidier spacing, icons, and group headers throughout, matching the design.
